title: Pitter Patter
excerpt: I've said it before and I will say it again and again. Seeing all you creative folks out there using our products makes my heart explode. In the best way possible. Feeling truly inspired by all of your paper projects…
body: I've said it before and I will say it again and again. Seeing all you creative folks out there using our products makes my heart explode. In the best way possible. Feeling truly inspired by all of your paper projects using the Sketchbook line from American Crafts. Here are a few I've spotted lately:
